The '''Ac'fren Spur''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] and a branch of the larger [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]. The Spur originated at [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] in the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], and connected the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]] passing through [[Ques/Legends|Ques]] on the way.

For many years, around the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a group known as the [[Disac pirates]] were a presence on this route. However, they were later wiped out by one [[Ket Maliss]], a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] liberated a [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] weapons cache in the Ac'fren Spur.<ref name="Databank">{{DB|technology|cr1blastercannon|CR-1 blaster cannon}}</ref>
